name: Plum Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour and sugar in a bowl.
2. Cut in the cold butter with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add one egg to the mixture and stir with a fork until blended.
4. Pat the batter into a 9-inch quiche pan and sprinkle with chopped nuts.
5. Arrange halved plums on top of the batter.
6. Beat together two eggs, sour cream, and sugar in another bowl.
7. Pour the filling over the plums.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1-1/4 hours.
9. Reduce the temperature to 375°F and brown the cake for an additional 10 minutes.
